Tutorial.name: Tutorial

on_finish: Starter kit already granted by tutorial bypass

reward_caveats: Current tree force-finishes unfinished tutorial state on quest load.
Skipping tutorial no longer misses the starter kit (bronzeaxe, knife, fishingpole, coppersword, woodenbow).
stage_summary: Treat the tutorial as already finished on this tree.
If you spawn in the tutorial box, warp to Mudwich.
Tutorial.walkthrough: Do not route the live agent through the raw tutorial stages. The current tree auto-completes unfinished tutorial state during quest load and grants the starter kit immediately.
Tutorial.tips: Use this as a finished quest, not as a replayable early-game route.

Foresting.name: Foresting
reward_caveats: Popup text says Rusted Axe, but the live reward item is ironaxe.
Foresting.walkthrough: Talk to Forester, collect 10 logs, turn them in, then collect and turn in 10 more logs.
walkthrough_steps: Talk to Forester at (216, 114). The first time, call interact_npc(name='Forester', accept_quest_offer=True).
Equip your starter bronzeaxe (slot 0). gather(resource_name='Oak Tree') near Mudwich north (cluster ~210, 110) until you have 10 logs.
Return to Forester. interact_npc('Forester') — turn-in is automatic when you have 10 logs.
Gather 10 more logs from the same Oak cluster.
Return to Forester one more time. Quest finishes; you receive `ironaxe` (popup text says 'Rusted Axe' — that's a typo, the actual item is ironaxe).

item_sources.Logs: gather Oak Tree near Mudwich north (~210, 110). Bronze axe sufficient.

Desert Quest.name: Desert Quest
Desert Quest.npc: Dying Soldier (`lavanpc`), Wife (`villagegirl`) via door at (310,264)
reward_caveats: Quest popup says you gain nothing; the meaningful live value is the warp unlocks.
stage_summary: Talk to Dying Soldier and receive `cd`.
Desert Quest.walkthrough: Talk to the Dying Soldier, deliver the `cd` to the Wife through the quest house door, then return to the Dying Soldier.
Desert Quest.tips: Do this early to unlock the Crullfield and Lakesworld warps.

Anvil's Echoes.name: Anvil's Echoes
reward_caveats: Live reward is `smithingboots` (L10 boots) plus 420 Smithing XP. Popup text and reward now aligned.
Anvil's Echoes.walkthrough: A two-talk quest. Speak to the Blacksmith twice to finish it.

Royal Drama.name: Royal Drama
reward_caveats: Top-level reward text says castle access, but the real reward is 10000 gold.
Royal Drama.walkthrough: Talk to the Royal Guard, find the Rat in the sewers, then return to the King.
Royal Drama.tips: This is the biggest single early gold injection in the route.

Royal Pet.name: Royal Pet
reward_caveats: Reward item `catpet` now exists and materializes.
stage_summary: Talk to King and receive 3 books.
Deliver one book each to Shepherd Boy, Flaris, and Fisherman in any order.
Royal Pet.walkthrough: Accept the quest from the King, deliver the 3 books to the three recipients in any order, then return to the King.
Royal Pet.tips: The three deliveries are substages, so do them in the order that minimizes travel.

Sorcery and Stuff.name: Sorcery and Stuff
reward_caveats: Reward item `staff` now exists and materializes in inventory.
Sorcery and Stuff.walkthrough: Talk to the Sorcerer, collect 3 beads, then return. The safest current-tree route is farming live `unusual`-table mobs rather than relying on stale crab-cave waypoint lore.

item_sources.Bead: Farm the Hermit Crab Warrior miniboss at (320, 455) — guaranteed `bead` drop via warriorcrab drop table. Respawn 35s. Fall back to unusual-table mobs only if the crab is unavailable.

Sorcery and Stuff.tips: Treat this as a normal completable quest with a broken final item reward.

Rick's Roll.name: Rick's Roll
reward_caveats: Header reward text says Cooking XP; actual reward is gold.
stage_summary: Take Rick's `seaweedroll` through the stage-2 door.
Rick's Roll.walkthrough: Talk to Rick, fish and cook 5 shrimp, turn them in to receive `seaweedroll`, then traverse the stage-2 door chain to Lena. The stage-2 door at (260, 229) does NOT land you next to Lena — it drops you in a multi-room puzzle of teleporters where most ladders loop back and only one per room advances.
Rick's Roll.tips: Stage-2 puzzle: each room has 3-4 ladder/door tiles where most loop back to the entry tile. Inside the first room, the path north from (425, 909) to the real exit at (425, 901) crosses a decoy at (425, 905), so detour off the center column (e.g. via (424, 902)). The full advance chain is documented step-by-step below.
walkthrough_steps: Rick at (1088, 833) is in a region disjoint from Mudwich. Use the warp+door route: warp(location='mudwich') (or just stay there at start), navigate from Mudwich southeast through the corridor, step on door 1025 at (379, 388) which teleports you to (1138, 800), then walk west to Rick.
Once adjacent to Rick: interact_npc(name='Rick', accept_quest_offer=True).

Equip the starter fishingpole (slot 2 of starter kit). gather('Shrimp Fishing Spot') from a shore tile — e.g. seed-friendly approach is (324, 360) standing west of spot (325, 360). Repeat until you have 5 rawshrimp.
Walk to a cooking station (Babushka's room near (706, 605) is the closest). craft_item(skill='cooking', recipe_key='cookedshrimp', count=5).
Return to Rick (interact_npc). He takes the 5 cookedshrimp and gives you a `seaweedroll` plus advances you to stage 2.
Stage-2 door 1 of 4: step on (260, 229) — teleports to (425, 909) inside an enclosed puzzle room. Decoys at (421, 903), (425, 905), (429, 903) all loop back here.

Stage-2 door 2 of 4: walk to (424, 902) FIRST (off-column waypoint — the straight-north path would cross the (425, 905) decoy and bounce you back). Then walk to (425, 901) and step on it — teleports to (453, 904) inside Lena's upper room.

Stage-2 door 3 of 4: walk south to (453, 907) and step on it — teleports to (426, 927) in the lower-left room. Decoys (449, 904), (453, 901), (457, 904) in the upper room loop back to the start; avoid them.
Stage-2 door 4 of 4: walk NE to (431, 920) and step on it — teleports to (455, 930) in a narrow corridor adjacent to Lena's room. The other ladder (422, 920) is a decoy back to (425, 909).

From (455, 930), walk one tile north into Lena's room and navigate to her at (455, 924). interact_npc('Lena'). Quest finishes; receive 1987 gold (popup text mentions Cooking XP — that's a typo, the actual reward is gold).

Sea Activities.name: Sea Activities
Sea Activities.npc: Sponge (`sponge`), Pickle NPC (`picklenpc`), Sea Cucumber boss (`picklemob`)

practical: Undersea route is unavailable before Water Guardian.

reward_caveats: Stage 5 gives 1 gold temporarily, but you hand it back in at stage 6.
Net payout is 10000 gold, not 10001.
Top-level reward text says 1000 gold.
stage_summary: Talk to Pickle NPC and receive 1 gold.
Return the coin to Sponge for the final payout.
Sea Activities.walkthrough: Complete the Sponge and Pickle talk chain (multi-room door routing), kill the Mermaid en route to earn `mermaidguard`, then enter the stage-4 arena via a SEPARATE door from the Pickle room, defeat `picklemob`, take the temporary coin from Pickle, and return it to Sponge for the 10,000 gold payout.
Sea Activities.tips: Door routing has TWO traps: (1) the Mermaid at (676, 851) is a hard prereq for door 556 — kill her on the FIRST trip through the corridor to grant `mermaidguard`. (2) Door 556 lands you NEAR Pickle, NOT in the picklemob arena. The arena is a separate teleport at (693, 836) → (858, 808); do not skip this step or `attack(Sea Cucumber)` will fail with 'mob not nearby'.
walkthrough_steps: Hard prerequisite: kill the Water Guardian at (293, 729) to earn the `waterguardian` achievement. Without it, warp(location='undersea') silently fails. Water Guardian is lvl 36, 350 HP — bring at least mid-tier gear (coppersword + Strength Lv30+).
Once `waterguardian` is earned: warp(location='undersea') lands you near (43, 313). Sponge is at (52, 310).
Stage 0 → 1: interact_npc(name='Sponge', accept_quest_offer=True).

Stage 1→2 leg 1 (Sponge → Pickle corridor): navigate to door 539 at (46, 363) and step on it — teleports to (665, 836). You are now in the same region as Pickle but separated from him by a gated door.

Stage 1→2 leg 2 (kill Mermaid): the Mermaid spawns at (676, 851), 11 tiles south of door 539's landing tile. Lvl 55 miniboss, 28 defense — manageable for a chained-playthrough agent that has grinded toward picklemob (Lvl 88), so this is a free intermediate fight. Killing her grants the `mermaidguard` achievement, which is the gate on door 556. Skip this and door 556 will block with 'You need to complete the achievement Mermaid Sword to pass through this door.'

Stage 1→2 leg 3 (Sponge → Pickle): walk NE to (688, 843), one tile NORTH of door 556. Then traverse_door (683, 844) — DO NOT navigate directly to (683, 844) or to (688, 844); both are door tiles and stepping on them mid-navigate will teleport you before traverse_door fires. Door 556 lands you at (688, 844), which is NEAR Pickle (691, 838) but is NOT the picklemob arena — Pickle stands in a small chamber adjacent to the arena entry.
Stage 1→2 leg 4 (talk Pickle): walk to Pickle at (691, 838) and interact_npc(name='Sea Cucumber') — that advances stage 1→2.

Stages 2→3 (Pickle → Sponge): reverse the chain — navigate to (688, 843), traverse_door (688, 844) → (683, 844), navigate to (665, 837), traverse_door (665, 836) → (46, 363), then walk overland to Sponge at (52, 310). interact_npc('Sponge') — stage 2→3.
Stages 3→4 (Sponge → Pickle, repeat the chain): same as the stage 1→2 chain. interact_npc on Pickle at the end advances stage 3→4. The Mermaid stays dead so doors 556/557 are open both directions.

Stage 4 (enter the arena and kill picklemob): from Pickle (691, 838) walk to the arena entry door at (693, 836) and step on it — teleports to (858, 808) inside the arena. picklemob (display name 'Sea Cucumber') is at (858, 815), 7 tiles south. Lvl 88, 1250 HP — needs mid-route gear at minimum. attack(mob_name='Sea Cucumber') in a swing loop until killed:true.

Stages 5→7: walk back to Pickle (out of the arena via the same door, 858,808 ↔ 693,836), interact_npc('Sea Cucumber') — receives 1 gold, advances stage 4→5. Then traverse the full reverse chain back to Sponge (door 557 → door 538 → overland), interact_npc('Sponge'). Final reward is 10,000 gold net (the 1 gold from stage 5 is consumed at stage 6).

Scientist's Potion.name: Scientist's Potion
reward_caveats: This is a one-talk stub quest.
No quest-side store unlock or Alchemy XP is actually wired.
known_mismatches: Flavor text promises potion-store access and 2000 Alchemy XP.
stage_summary: Talk to Scientist and accept the quest prompt.
Scientist's Potion.walkthrough: Talk to the Scientist once. `stageCount = 1`, so the quest starts and finishes immediately, and the important effect is Alchemy access.
Scientist's Potion.tips: Do this as soon as you want Alchemy; no follow-up route exists on this tree.

Arts and Crafts.name: Arts and Crafts

practical: Crafting unlocks as soon as the quest is started.
Pendant path needs Foraging 5 and 1 beryl from the Miner shop (20g).
Final stew needs Fletching 5 and Cooking 1.

reward_caveats: The real unlock is on quest start, not on completion.
known_mismatches: The final stew recipe uses `bowlmedium`, not the `bowlsmall` she takes at stage 2.
stage_summary: Talk to Babushka to unlock Crafting.
Cook and turn in `stew` using `bowlmedium + mushroom1 + tomato`.
Arts and Crafts.walkthrough: Start the quest with Babushka, craft `berylpendant`, then `bowlsmall`, then a fresh `bowlmedium` for the final `stew` recipe.
Arts and Crafts.items_needed: berylpendant x1, bowlsmall x1, stew x1

crafting_chain.stew: bowlmedium x1 + mushroom1 x1 + tomato x1

Arts and Crafts.tips: Babushka's ingredients store is inconvenient while her NPC slot is claimed by this quest, so source the final mushroom from drops. Chained-fletch caveat: Kaetram's Crafting interface stays open after a craft_item call; a second craft_item on the same skill may land as a no-op (selected_name updates client-side, but inventory does not). Workaround: between fletch crafts, force the menu closed (move 1 tile or call interact_npc on a non-shop NPC) before re-opening. The seeded reachability path uses pre-fletched intermediates to sidestep this.
walkthrough_steps: Babushka at (702, 608) is in a region disjoint from Mudwich. The canonical route requires the Aynor warp (gated by ancientlands quest) plus door 463 at (406, 292) → (433, 270), then walk to door (483, 275) which teleports to (702, 613) inside her room.

Without ancientlands, an alternate route is: get to door (483, 275) on the Babushka exterior region somehow (no overland path from Mudwich exists per the static map). For a vanilla agent the practical route is: complete enough other quests to unlock a connecting warp, OR seed the agent at Babushka.
Once adjacent to Babushka: interact_npc(name='Babushka', accept_quest_offer=True). This UNLOCKS Crafting on quest start (the unlock fires before you complete).

Stage 1 → 2 (berylpendant): gather('Blue Lily Bush') at (278, 250) for 1 bluelily, then craft_item(skill='crafting', recipe_key='string'). Buy 1 beryl from the Miner shop (interact_npc('Miner') at 323,178; 20g — the Miner is a generic vendor on the agent route, MQ1 is auto-bypassed on login so the shop opens directly). craft_item(skill='crafting', recipe_key='berylpendant'). interact_npc('Babushka') to turn in.

Stage 2 → 3 (bowlsmall): collect 1 logs (Foraging Lv1, Oak Tree near Mudwich). craft_item(skill='fletching', recipe_key='stick', count=1) → 4 sticks. **Force the Fletching menu closed before the next craft** (move 1 tile or call interact_npc on a non-shop NPC) — chaining stick→bowlsmall in the same open interface lands the second packet as a no-op. Then craft_item(skill='fletching', recipe_key='bowlsmall', count=1) (needs 2 sticks). interact_npc('Babushka') to turn in.

Stage 3 → 4 (stew): NOTE — server actually wants `bowlmedium`, not `bowlsmall`, for the final stew despite Babushka taking bowlsmall at stage 2. Same chained-craft caveat applies: close the Fletching menu before craft_item(skill='fletching', recipe_key='bowlmedium', count=1) (4 sticks). gather one tomato (220, 108) and one mushroom1 (drops from goblins/ogres/etc — slow, ~0.75% per kill; consider Babushka's store after the quest finishes). craft_item(skill='cooking', recipe_key='stew', count=1) using bowlmedium + tomato + mushroom1. interact_npc('Babushka') to finish.

Miner's Quest.name: Miner's Quest
Miner's Quest.blocked_reason: Auto-bypassed on login (no Mining XP granted). Mining is not part of the agent playthrough. Treat the Miner NPC as a generic vendor only — buy ores, beryl, weapons, and armor from the shop.
Miner's Quest.walkthrough: Do not accept this quest. The Miner is a vendor, not a quest giver.

Miner's Quest II.name: Miner's Quest II
Miner's Quest II.blocked_reason: Requires Miner's Quest I and Mining 30, both blocked by the auto-bypass. Mining is not part of the agent playthrough.

Herbalist's Desperation.name: Herbalist's Desperation
reward_caveats: Header text says "Mystical Potion", but the actual reward is hotsauce plus 1500 Foraging XP.
Popup spacing typo ("Foragingexperience") now fixed to "Foraging experience".
Herbalist's Desperation.walkthrough: Talk to the Herbalist, turn in 3 blue lilies, then 2 paprikas and 2 tomatoes.

item_sources.Blue Lily: Forage Blue Lily Bush at Foraging 5. First placement (278, 250). Cluster spans (278–441, 250–363).
item_sources.Tomato: Forage Tomato Bush at Foraging 5. Cluster near Mudwich at (113–386, 107–326), e.g. (220, 108). 25 XP/pull.
item_sources.Paprika: Forage Paprika Bush at Foraging 5. Cluster (286–390, 240–484), e.g. (298, 301). 50 XP/pull — best XP of the three.

Herbalist's Desperation.tips: All three required nodes share a single Foraging 5 gate — grind once (~25 blueberry gathers), harvest in any order.
walkthrough_steps: Talk to Herbalist (333, 281) and accept_quest_offer=True.
Grind Foraging on Blueberry Bush at Mudwich (155, 103). ~25 gathers to Lv5 unlocks Blue Lily, Tomato, and Paprika together.
Walk to Blue Lily Bush (278, 250). Gather 3x bluelily.
Return to Herbalist and turn in the lilies via interact_npc.
Walk to Paprika Bush (298, 301). Gather 2 paprika.
Walk to Tomato Bush (220, 108). Gather 2 tomato.
Return to Herbalist for final turn-in.

Scavenger.name: Scavenger
Scavenger.npc: Village Girl (`villagegirl2`), Old Lady (`oldlady`) via door at (147,113)
reward_caveats: Ignore the long fake shopping-list dialogue; the real turn-in is tiny.
stage_summary: Turn in `tomato x2 + strawberry x2 + string x1`.
Scavenger.walkthrough: Start with the Village Girl, talk to the Old Lady through the quest door, then turn in 2 tomatoes, 2 strawberries, and 1 string.

item_sources.Tomato: Forage at Foraging 5, buy from ingredients store, or get vegetable-table drops.
item_sources.Strawberry: Fruit-table drop from goblins, ogres, ants, hobgoblins — now ~10% per kill after drop-rate patch (was 0.8%). Plan ~20 goblin kills for 2 strawberries.
item_sources.String: Craft from bluelily at Crafting 1 (requires Arts and Crafts started) or get ordinary-table drops.

Scavenger.tips: The ingredient turn-in is simple, but sourcing the items can take time if you have low Foraging.

Clam Chowder.name: Clam Chowder
reward_caveats: Stage 0 dialogue now correctly says "fish some clams" (was "defeat clams"). Live mechanic is fishing clamspot nodes.
Quest file top-level reward field is still malformed; trust final stage reward.
Clam Chowder.walkthrough: Fish 5 clams for the first turn-in, then complete two separate 2-chowder deliveries before returning to Pretzel.

crafting_chain.clamchowder: clamobject x1 + potato x1 + bowlsmall x1

Clam Chowder.tips: Full practical material list is 9 clams, 4 potatoes, and 4 bowlsmall.

Ancient Lands.name: Ancient Lands
Ancient Lands.walkthrough: Talk to the Ancient Monument, kill the Ice Knight at (808,813) for `icesword`, then return it for `snowpotion` and the mountain gate unlock.
Ancient Lands.tips: This is the capstone working quest on the current tree.

Evil Santa.name: Evil Santa
reward_caveats: Stage 1 door placed at (525, 340-345) based on existing evilsanta dynamic area; playtest-verify that the door fires before relying on it.
`candykey` now drops from `santaelf` at 1.5% — farm those mobs to get past the stage 3 door.
stage_summary: Walk through the stage 1 quest door at (525, 340) — verify it fires.
Farm `santaelf` mobs for `candykey` (~1.5% drop, thematic mob).
Enter stage 3 door at (748, 607) using candykey.
Evil Santa.walkthrough: Full chain now playable after recent patches. Go to snowshepherdboy, use the stage 1 door near (525, 340), reach santaelfnpc in the sweatshop, farm santaelf for candykey, then push through to Santa. Note the stage 1 door placement is reasoned-but-unverified.
Evil Santa.tips: Do not spend time pathing this; it is source-blocked.

The Coder's Glitch.name: The Coder's Glitch
The Coder's Glitch.prereqs: Foresting + Desert Quest + Sorcery and Stuff; Accuracy 15 + Strength 20 + Defense 15
reward_caveats: Stage 0 `noc` typo fixed; talking to the Coder now binds stage 0 correctly.
`skeletonkingtalisman` item now exists as a quest token.
stage_summary: Kill the Skeleton King (L32, 1850 HP boss) — drops `skeletonkingtalisman`.
Return to the Coder with the talisman.
The Coder's Glitch.walkthrough: Skip this quest. Even though later stages describe a Skeleton King kill, the current tree cannot cleanly start or complete the quest.
The Coder's Glitch.tips: Treat this whole quest line as blocked content.

The Coder's Glitch II.name: The Coder's Glitch II
The Coder's Glitch II.prereqs: The Coder's Glitch + Miner's Quest + Scavenger; Accuracy 25 + Strength 40 + Defense 30
reward_caveats: Three talisman items now exist as quest tokens.
Prerequisite (The Coder's Glitch) is now unblocked.
stage_summary: Talk to the Coder after completing The Coder's Glitch.
Kill the Ogre Lord (L44, 2850 HP) — drops `ogrelordtalisman`.
Kill the Queen Ant (L94, 4200 HP) — drops `queenanttalisman`.
Kill the Forest Dragon (L258, 6942 HP) — drops `forestdragontalisman`.
Return all three talismans to the Coder.
The Coder's Glitch II.walkthrough: Skip this quest. The boss gauntlet is described in quest data, but the required talismans are not live items on this tree.
The Coder's Glitch II.tips: Blocked by both missing items and an already-blocked prerequisite.

Coder's Fallacy.name: Coder's Fallacy
Coder's Fallacy.prereqs: The Coder's Glitch II + Anvil's Echoes + Scientist's Potion; Alchemy 35 + Smithing 45
reward_caveats: Prerequisite chain (Coder's Glitch II + Anvil's Echoes + Scientist's Potion) is now reachable.
Requires Alchemy 35 + Smithing 45.
Single-talk stage; reward is flavor-only ("Key to a secret room") with no itemReward.
stage_summary: Intended flow is only a single talk stage.
The blocked prerequisite chain makes the quest unreachable.
Coder's Fallacy.walkthrough: Skip this quest. It is a stub that depends on blocked prerequisite content.
Coder's Fallacy.tips: Do not grind toward its Alchemy or Smithing requirements on the current tree.
